title: The Events of This Year
description: Among the events of this year: Muhammad b. Marwan 's summer expedition when the Byzantines attacked near Mar'ash.51 In this year, 'Abd al-Malik appointed Yahya b. al-I;Iakam b. Abi al-'Ag governor of Medina.52 In this year, 'Abd al-Malik appointed al-Hajjaj b. Yusuf governor of Iraq, excluding Khurasan and Sijistan.53 Al-Ilajjaj proceeded to al-Kufah.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
